name: Gold Tone Minimalist Lariat Necklace
description: Achieve effortless elegance with this gold-tone lariat necklace. Featuring a sleek snake chain that loops through an open irregular oval and finishes with a polished sphere drop, this anti-tarnish piece is perfect for modern, sophisticated styling.

media.alt_text: Model wearing a gold tone lariat necklace with an open oval loop and sphere drop

faqs.question: How do you wear this necklace?
faqs.answer: The necklace features a lariat design where the chain with the sphere drop is threaded through the open oval loop, allowing you to easily adjust the drop length to your preference.

faqs.question: Is the jewelry anti-tarnish?
faqs.answer: Yes, this necklace is crafted with a high-quality anti-tarnish finish to ensure it maintains its radiant gold tone.

meta_title: Gold Tone Minimalist Lariat Necklace | Anti-Tarnish
meta_description: Shop the Gold Tone Minimalist Lariat Necklace. Featuring a chic open loop and sphere drop on a sleek chain, crafted with an enduring anti-tarnish finish.
